name: Shahi Gobi
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind onion and garlic to a paste.
2. Mix gram flour, salt, and chili powder with enough water to form a thin batter.
3. Cut cabbage into long, thin slices. Dip the slices in the batter and deep fry until light golden brown. Drain and set aside.
4. Heat ghee or oil in a skillet and cook onion and garlic paste until golden brown.
5. Add spices (garam masala, turmeric powder) and cook for another minute.
6. Stir in diced tomatoes and continue cooking until the ghee or oil begins to separate and rise to the top.
7. Mash the mixture with the back of a wooden spoon.
8. Gradually add 2 cups of water. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat.
9. Add the fried cabbage slices and cook until the cabbage is tender and the sauce has thickened.
10. Garnish with chopped coriander and serve.
